arts.ttl: Leeds United player braced for disappointing Farke news ahead of Blackburn trip
arts.sum: Joe Rodon and Wilfried Gnonto are on four yellows apiece and will be banned for one match if they pick up another caution today. Junior Firpo and Jayden Bogle may have got theirs out of the way, but Leeds have another two players trying to inch across the five-yellow suspension tightrope towards December 7.

arts.ttl: Player’s Leeds United exit ‘could be completed’ in January – Club ready to ‘dig deep into pockets’
arts.sum: Red Bull Salzburg have a ‘strong interest’ in bringing Leeds United’s Maximilian Wöber back to the club in the winter market. That’s according to Salzburger Nachrichten, who state the Austrian side will try again after a failed attempt in the summer. The centre-back joined Leeds from Red Bull Salzburg in 2023 and was on loan The post Player’s Leeds United exit ‘could be completed’ in January – Club ready to ‘dig deep into pockets’ appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Player interested in signing for Leeds United – Could choose Whites over Liverpool
arts.sum: Leeds United are in the picture to sign FC Nordsjælland’s Daniel Svensson and could even have an advantage over Liverpool and Juventus. This was initially reported by Fotboll Direkt last weekend, and they stated the Whites are following the 22-year-old. He made 18 appearances for the Danish club this season and made his debut for The post Player interested in signing for Leeds United – Could choose Whites over Liverpool appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers predicted team with tactical tweak against Leeds United
arts.sum: A look at how Blackburn Rovers might line-up against the Whites

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder repeats Leeds United point after Sheffield United's return to top spot
arts.sum: “I said it when we played Leeds, if you keep turning the ball over then, no matter what formation, what system you play, you allow good players to counter on you and turn the tide. I've got to say it was a tight game, even before the game I was hugely impressed with them and their start, they've got a lot of good players right the way through the team.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke may be about to make incredibly harsh Leeds United decision today
arts.sum: Leeds United left-back Sam Byram has been immense since coming in for the suspended Junior Firpo, but the ex-Barcelona man is available today and surely making his way back into the side. Leeds United boost: Junior Firpo back in contention today

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Blackburn Rovers with one big doubt and two players sidelined
arts.sum: Describing eighth-placed Rovers as "one of the top teams in the division", Farke said: “It's a tough test for us and it will be another difficult game, but we don't complain, we just want to make sure that we are on it again. By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen.

arts.ttl: Leeds United promotion race takes new twist after Sheffield United vs Sunderland amid double boost
arts.sum: The Whites went into the weekend at the top of the Championship table, but knew they would lose that place with second place Sheffield United and fourth placed Sunderland facing each other at Bramall Lane on Friday night. While that moves them above Leeds and to the top of the Championship table, it also means that the Whites can open up a five-point gap on Sunderland should they beat Blackburn Rovers at Ewood Park on Saturday (1.30pm kick-off).

arts.ttl: Leeds United man surely set for exit, it should open door for eye-catching replacement
arts.sum: Leeds United forward Joe Gelhardt looks virtually certain to be leaving the club on loan in the new year with vast amounts of interest already emerging and playing time scarce under Daniel Farke. A report from the Yorkshire Evening Post this week shared that Leeds forward Gelhardt is open to leaving the club in the new year.
